codeReview.summary: Implementation matches the feature intent: canvas now passes `dynamicNodeVersion` into AddNodeMenu as `definitionsVersion`, and AddNodeMenu recomputes both category grouping and flat item lists when that version changes. This resolves the stale memoization path where dynamic provider definitions were registered but the palette list did not refresh.

issues.description: The regression test asserts through `memoSlots[2]`, which is tightly coupled to the current internal hook call order inside AddNodeMenu. Reordering or adding `useMemo` calls could break this test even if runtime behavior remains correct.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The frontend-worker procedure still prescribes running the unfiltered full frontend suite, while this mission has known excluded covalt-n8n failures and already defines a filtered frontend command. This causes repeat procedure deviations despite correct worker behavior.

summary: Reviewed commit 5c9f825d3abdf09d069e3d6ce668dab1fb825c6b: the stale Add Node menu memoization bug is fixed and behavior aligns with expected outcomes; no blocking defects found, with one non-blocking test brittleness note.
